title: TRQP Combined Assurance Manifest
description: A minimal, tool-agnostic manifest that binds protocol conformance results and security/privacy posture results to a single build identifier and evidence set.

build_id.description: A stable identifier that ties together CI run/build/package.

target.description: System under test identifier (e.g., registry base URL, deployment name).

commit.description: Git commit SHA or build provenance pointer.

build.description: Build provenance and execution context for this assurance run.

generated_at.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp of manifest generation.

profile_id.description: Conformance profile identifier applied during the run.

run_id.description: Tool-specific run identifier (CI job id, invocation id, or report id).

trqp_conformance_suite.description: Metadata for the TRQP Conformance Suite execution that produced/validated artifacts.

assurance_level.description: Assurance level as defined by TRQP‑TSPP (AL1–AL4).

run_id.description: Tool-specific run identifier (CI job id, invocation id, or report id).

trqp_tspp.description: Metadata for the TRQP-TSPP execution (trust service provider profile evaluation).

tools.description: Tool versions and run identifiers for each participating tool.

kind.description: Artifact classification (e.g., manifest, report, evidence bundle, log, policy bundle).

path.description: Repository-relative path to the artifact file.

sha256.description: SHA-256 digest of the artifact file (hex) for integrity verification.

media_type.description: IANA media type for the artifact (e.g., application/json, text/markdown).

produced_by.description: Identifier of the tool/component that produced this artifact.

notes.description: Human-readable notes about the artifact, including how to interpret or use it.

artifacts.description: List of produced artifacts referenced by relative paths.

overall_status.description: Overall outcome of the combined assurance run.

conformance_status.description: Outcome of the TRQP Conformance Suite checks against the target.

tspp_status.description: Outcome of the TRQP-TSPP checks against the target.

notes.description: Human-readable notes summarizing key findings, deviations, or remediation hints.

summary.description: Optional roll-up statuses for human consumption.

generator.description: Optional self-identification for the tool/script that generated this manifest.

uri.description: Optional URI for generator source or docs.
